subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 211008665/655401471 is not a GRB
body:
B. Hristov (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi-GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 211008665/655401471
at 15:57:46.42 UT on 08 October 2021, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not a GRB.  The event is likely due to SGR J1935+2154."

For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit
the official Fermi GBM Support Page:
https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/
